# Documentation Update Pull Request

## Type of Documentation Update

- [ ] README.md
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] API Documentation
- [ ] Setup Guide
- [ ] Overlay Documentation
- [ ] Code Comments
- [ ] Other: \_\_\_

## Related Issue

Relates to #\_\_\_ (link to documentation issue if applicable)

## Description

What documentation is being added, updated, or improved?

### Before

Current documentation (if updating):

```
[existing text or indicate "N/A" for new documentation]
```

### After

New or updated documentation:

```
[new text]
```

## Reason for Change

Why is this documentation change needed?

- Clarification needed
- Information was missing
- Outdated content
- Better examples needed
- Other: ...

## Scope

- [ ] New contributor guide
- [ ] End user documentation
- [ ] Developer documentation
- [ ] API reference
- [ ] Setup/installation guide
- [ ] Troubleshooting guide

## Affected Areas

What part(s) of the documentation does this impact?

- Setup instructions
- Contributing guidelines
- Deployment process
- API usage
- Overlay configuration
- Other: ...

## Files Changed

- `docs/file.md`
- `README.md`
- `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- (etc.)

## Checklist

- [ ] Spelling and grammar checked
- [ ] Links are working and accurate
- [ ] Code examples are correct and tested
- [ ] Formatting is consistent with existing docs
- [ ] Includes any necessary code snippets or screenshots
- [ ] Documentation is clear for target audience
